form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 6 length fifth (30.25) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at The Meadows. Expected to feature on best form.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2.25 lengths in a SE last start at Sandown, recording an excellent 29.32 over the 515m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Sandown, recording an exceptional 29.32 over the 515m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 600m at The Meadows in a handy (34.69), beating Texas President. Will find this a bit tougher, this will test.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 1.75 lengths at The Meadows. Form solid prior to that including a win at The Meadows three back. Tough line-up and place prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 460m at this track. That followed a win two back in 26.04 beating Shade Of Pale over 460m at this track. Others read better.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 1.4 lengths second over 520m this track in 29.94. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at this track on March 20 over 400m in 22.38. In line for a hat-trick. Must include.
